title: Swim in Menorca – Macarella to Son Xoriguer Open-Water Swim
location: De Cala Macarella a Son Xoriguer, costa sur
description: A 10 km open-water swim linking Cala Macarella with Son Xoriguer, passing Turqueta, Es Talaier and Son Saura, some of the south coast's most beautiful coves. Organised by the Menorca Channel Swimming Association, it is traditionally held on the last Sunday of September, falling on 27 September in 2026. Confirm the official programme.
